Billetto.Events.Event.name: Event
Billetto.Events.Event.description: A public ticketed event from the Billetto platform, including title, schedule, venue, organizer, pricing, and ticket availability status.

schema.name: Event
schema.description: A public ticketed event from the Billetto platform. Each record represents a single upcoming or ongoing public event with schedule, venue, organizer, pricing, and availability information.

event_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the event on the Billetto platform, assigned at event creation. Used as the Kafka key and CloudEvents subject for stable event identity across polls.

title.description: Event title as set by the organizer.

description.description: Full event description in HTML format as provided by the organizer. May be null if not set.

startdate.description: Event start date and time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2026-06-15T19:00:00'). Used as the CloudEvents time attribute.

enddate.description: Event end date and time in ISO 8601 format. Null when no end time is specified by the organizer.

url.description: Canonical URL of the event page on the Billetto platform.

image_link.description: URL of the cover image for the event as uploaded by the organizer.

status.description: Event lifecycle status as reported by the Billetto platform. Common values include 'published', 'cancelled', and 'postponed'.

location_city.description: City where the event is held, from the event location object.

location_name.description: Venue name where the event is held, from the event location object.

location_address.description: Street address of the event venue, from the event location object.

location_zip_code.description: Postal code of the event venue, from the event location object.

location_country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the event venue (e.g. 'DK' for Denmark, 'GB' for Great Britain, 'DE' for Germany). From the event location object.

location_latitude.description: WGS 84 latitude of the event venue in decimal degrees. From the event location object.

location_longitude.description: WGS 84 longitude of the event venue in decimal degrees. From the event location object.

organiser_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the event organizer on the Billetto platform. From the event organiser object.

organiser_name.description: Display name of the event organizer as registered on the Billetto platform. From the event organiser object.

minimum_price_amount_in_cents.description: Minimum ticket price across all available ticket types, expressed in the smallest currency unit (e.g. pence for GBP, øre for DKK, cent for EUR). Zero indicates a free event. From the event minimum_price object.

minimum_price_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the minimum ticket price (e.g. 'GBP', 'DKK', 'EUR', 'NOK', 'SEK'). From the event minimum_price object.

availability.description: Ticket availability status for the event. 'available' means tickets are currently on sale. 'sold_out' means all tickets have been sold. 'unavailable' means ticket sales are not yet open or have closed. Null when not determinable from the API response.
